name: OpenClaw Data China Stock
description: A-share / ETF / option market data plugin for OpenClaw with unified market data API, fund-flow and screener tools, multi-factor equity screening (tool_screen_equity_factors), stock views, and technical indicator engine (P0+P1+P2, 58 indicators) powered by TA-Lib/pandas-ta fallback.

apiBaseUrl.description: 可选外部服务 API 基础地址（仅部分兼容接口可能需要）

scriptPath.description: tool_runner.py 绝对路径（可选；不填则使用插件内的默认路径）

manifestPath.description: 工具清单 JSON 路径（可选），不填则使用插件内 config/tools_manifest.json

maxConcurrentUpstream.description: 进程内上游 HTTP/AkShare 并发上限；映射环境变量 OPENCLAW_MAX_CONCURRENT_UPSTREAM（0 表示不限制）
